mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT BOARD_RESULT.*, ROWNUM AS RN
FROM ( SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, B.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, B.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, B.TITLE AS title, B.CONTENT AS content, B.ANIMAL_ID AS animalId, B.HIT AS hit, B.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, B.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt,
NVL( M.NICKNAME, '알 수 없음' ) AS writerNickname,
A.ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, PA.ANIMAL_NAME AS parentAnimalName, PA.ANIMAL_ID AS parentAnimalId,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_COMMENT BC WHERE BC.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ) AS commentCount,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_IMAGE BI WHERE BI.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ) AS imageCount,
/* 멍냥백서 대표 이미지 한 장 Oracle 11g에서도 사용 가능 */ ( SELECT MIN(BI.IMAGE_URL) KEEP ( DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY BI.IMAGE_ID ) FROM BOARD_IMAGE BI WHERE BI.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ) AS thumbnailUrl,
/* 멍냥백서 대표 이미지 링크 */ ( SELECT MIN(BI.LINK_URL) KEEP ( DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY BI.IMAGE_ID ) FROM BOARD_IMAGE BI WHERE BI.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ) AS linkUrl
FROM BOARD B
LEFT JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID
LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE A ON B.ANIMAL_ID = A.ANIMAL_ID
LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE PA ON A.PARENT_ID = PA.ANIMAL_ID
ORDER BY B.BOARD_ID DESC ) BOARD_RESULT
WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{pageSize} )
WHERE RN > #{offset}

SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, B.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, B.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, B.TITLE AS title, B.CONTENT AS content, B.HIT AS hit, B.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, B.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, B.ANIMAL_ID AS animalId,
NVL( M.NICKNAME, '알 수 없음' ) AS writerNickname,
AT.ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, PAT.ANIMAL_ID AS parentAnimalId, PAT.ANIMAL_NAME AS parentAnimalName,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_COMMENT BC WHERE BC.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ) AS commentCount,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_IMAGE BI WHERE BI.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ) AS imageCount
FROM BOARD B
LEFT JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID
LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE AT ON B.ANIMAL_ID = AT.ANIMAL_ID
LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE PAT ON AT.PARENT_ID = PAT.ANIMAL_ID
WHERE B.BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD ( BOARD_ID, MEMBER_ID, BOARD_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENT, ANIMAL_ID ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{memberId}, #{boardType}, #{title}, #{content, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{animalId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )

INSERT INTO BOARD_IMAGE ( IMAGE_ID, BOARD_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, SAVED_NAME, IMAGE_URL, LINK_URL ) VALUES ( SEQ_BOARD_IMAGE.NEXTVAL, #{boardId}, #{originalName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{savedName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imageUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select:
SELECT IMAGE_ID AS imageId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, ORIGINAL_NAME AS originalName, SAVED_NAME AS savedName, IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl, LINK_URL AS linkUrl, CREATED_AT AS createdAt
FROM BOARD_IMAGE
WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
ORDER BY IMAGE_ID ASC

SELECT ANIMAL_ID AS animalId, ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, CATEGORY AS category, PARENT_ID AS parentId
FROM ANIMAL_TYPE
WHERE PARENT_ID IS NULL
ORDER BY ANIMAL_ID ASC

SELECT ANIMAL_ID AS animalId, ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, CATEGORY AS category, PARENT_ID AS parentId
FROM ANIMAL_TYPE
WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentId}
ORDER BY ANIMAL_ID ASC

SELECT BC.COMMENT_ID AS commentId, BC.BOARD_ID AS boardId, BC.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, BC.CONTENT AS content, BC.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, BC.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, NVL( M.NICKNAME, '알 수 없음' ) AS writerNickname, M.ROLE AS writerRole
FROM BOARD_COMMENT BC
LEFT JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON BC.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID
WHERE BC.BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
ORDER BY BC.COMMENT_ID ASC

SELECT BC.COMMENT_ID AS commentId, BC.BOARD_ID AS boardId, BC.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, BC.CONTENT AS content, BC.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, BC.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, NVL( M.NICKNAME, '알 수 없음' ) AS writerNickname, M.ROLE AS writerRole
FROM BOARD_COMMENT BC
LEFT JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON BC.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID
WHERE BC.COMMENT_ID = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD_COMMENT ( COMMENT_ID, BOARD_ID, MEMBER_ID, CONTENT ) VALUES ( SEQ_BOARD_COMMENT.NEXTVAL, #{boardId}, #{memberId}, #{content} )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM BOARD B
LEFT JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID
LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE A ON B.ANIMAL_ID = A.ANIMAL_ID
LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE PA ON A.PARENT_ID = PA.ANIMAL_ID
